summary: Frontend-only review of Marketplace (React + Firebase). Tested auth flows up to the email verification gate. 10/11 critical checks PASS. Confirmed via grep that no seed/sample/mock listing data exists anywhere in the codebase; Dashboard fetches strictly from Firestore via onSnapshot.

integration_issues.issue: Could not deterministically assert 'Invalid email or password' toast in automated run because a prior 'Welcome back' success toast from the immediately-preceding successful re-login was still visible in the toaster when the new error toast appeared. Firebase did return a 400 (auth/invalid-credential) for the bad-creds attempt, and the AuthPage error handler correctly maps that code to 'Invalid email or password' (AuthPage.jsx lines 49-50). The mapping itself is correct in code; this is a test-timing observation, not a functional bug.

action_items: Low priority: In AuthPage.jsx lines 19-25, navigate() is called during render which triggers the React warning: 'Cannot update a component (BrowserRouter) while rendering a different component (AuthPage)'. Wrap the auto-redirect in a useEffect to silence the warning and avoid potential state-update-during-render issues.

Optional: Auth success toast 'Welcome back' fires on login even when the user is unverified and will be redirected to /verify-email. Consider suppressing the success toast in that case to avoid confusing UX.
critical_code_review_comments: AuthPage.jsx (lines 19-25): navigate() called during render. Move into useEffect. Produces console error 'Cannot update a component while rendering a different component'.
No backend (FastAPI) in use; entire data layer is Firebase. Firebase apiKey is intentionally public per Firebase design, so the hardcoded config in firebase.js is acceptable.

Dashboard.jsx correctly uses onSnapshot with orderBy('createdAt','desc') and handles loading/error states. Empty-state behavior is correct (renders EmptyState only when listings array is empty post-fetch). No seed data anywhere.
ProtectedRoute.jsx correctly enforces both auth and emailVerified, redirecting unverified users to /verify-email.
VerifyEmail.jsx polls auth.currentUser.reload() every 4s which is reasonable, and the resend cooldown timer is implemented correctly (45s).
test_credentials: Fresh signup per run: teststudent_<unix_ts>@gmail.com / Test1234!. Confirmed working signup: teststudent_1779047106@gmail.com (used during this iteration).
seed_data_creation: None. Codebase grep for 'seed|mock|sample|fake|dummy|addDoc.*listings|setDoc.*listings' confirms zero seed listing data. The only addDoc on 'listings' collection is inside CreateListing.jsx (user-triggered form submit).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Firebase is fully reachable from the preview origin (student-bazaar-15.preview.emergentagent.com). All identitytoolkit.googleapis.com requests returned 200. Firestore Listen/Write channels are open. Email verification cannot be auto-completed in CI; tests should stop at the /verify-email gate. All required data-testids are present on AuthPage, VerifyEmail, Dashboard, and EmptyState. The single observed React console warning ('setState during render') originates from AuthPage's render-time navigate() call and is harmless but should be fixed.
passed_checks: App loads at /login with no white screen, no page errors
Split-screen UI renders correctly (left visual + right form)
Toggle via auth-toggle-mode-btn shows/hides signup-name-input correctly
Signup with fresh email succeeds via Firebase (200 from identitytoolkit accounts:signUp) and redirects to /verify-email
verify-email-card visible and contains the user's email
Visiting / while unverified redirects to /verify-email (ProtectedRoute works)
verify-resend-btn triggers 'Verification email sent' toast AND cooldown text changes to 'Resend in 43s'
verify-logout-btn signs out and returns to /login
Re-login with same unverified credentials re-routes to /verify-email
Mobile 375x800 renders /login with no horizontal scroll
Codebase contains NO fake/sample/mock/seed listings; Dashboard uses onSnapshot on 'listings' collection only
rca of the issue: N/A — no functional issues. Only one cosmetic React warning (setState during render) in AuthPage.
